description: A candid outdoor photograph (no graphic design, text, or seal overlay) of three federal tactical officers posing together on a flat white rooftop. All three wear camouflage tactical uniforms, body armor/plate carriers and sidearms; the central officer's face is digitally pixelated/blurred, while the others wear neck gaiters or masks. Behind them is a tattered, weathered American flag on a pole, an industrial/urban skyline with low buildings, a parking lot, chain-link fencing, power lines and a tall lattice tower under a partly cloudy sky. The image is a documentary on-the-ground photo associated with ICE operations at the Broadview facility near Chicago, not an agency-designed graphic. It carries no on-image text. Intent: convey the presence and resolve of federal officers under difficult conditions (the worn flag adds a rugged, embattled tone). Target audience: supporters of ICE enforcement and the general public.
